full_text:
Wang Mao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Maowas born in Taiyuan. Wang Yi, a Minister of the Song dynasty, claimed lineage from Wang Mao. Wang Mao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
